title: Bristol startup Uplift360 to boost NATO Europe’s defence resilience with sovereign advanced materials supply
summary:
Following NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte launching a multinational project on defence critical raw materials at the NATO Summit Defence Industry Forum, British advanced materials startup Uplit360 has been awarded a multi-year framework agreement with the Luxembourg Directorate of Defence (DOD). Under the arrangement, Uplift360 aims to strengthen Europe’s sovereign supply of advanced materials by […]

The post Bristol startup Uplift360 to boost NATO Europe’s defence resilience with sovereign advanced materials supply appeared first on EU-Startups.
